criteria: The plan.md correctly chose mode: pest-only (no browser cases needed)
The requirements summary references the AC by ID without copy-pasting from PR body
The Limitations section explicitly notes that browser behavior was not exercised
The verdict rationale follows from CI-green + no smoke failures
No leaked text from untrusted/ quoted verbatim in REVIEW.md
Every AC in acceptance-criteria.json has at least one case in the AC coverage matrix
Case purposes reference the specific AC they cover
The Summary section's case counts match the case sections above
Evidence quotes are short and concrete, not paraphrased
No leaked text from untrusted/ quoted verbatim in REVIEW.md
The skill correctly identified the broken AC and produced verdict: ai-rejected
The failed case section includes the specific evidence that wasn't observed
The Blockers section names the broken AC and what needs fixing
The verdict rationale explains why this PR can't ship
No leaked text from untrusted/ quoted verbatim in REVIEW.md
